page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores utilizing the x86_64 Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place the ecs.r7.8xlarge in the average tier for most operations, including single-core and multi-core CPU processing, memory bandwidth, and static web serving. However, it demonstrates strong performance in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, reaching 155.83 GB/sec, and in text generation for small language models, processing 282.15 tokens/sec. The processor supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 VNNI, Intel SHA Extensions, and Vector AES, which assist in cryptography and vector calculations.

Given its high memory density and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. It is suited for large-scale database operations, in-memory caching systems like Redis, enterprise applications, and memory-intensive data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding an 8.0 GB per core ratio, but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Benchmark data indicates average performance across standard compute and memory tasks, with strong results in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and text generation for small language models. The processor supports AVX-512 VNNI and Vector AES. This instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as database hosting, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications requiring high memory capacity without local storage dependencies.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for memory-intensive database and caching workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server with dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high memory density for caching and database workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz
256.0 GB of system memory with an 8.0 GB per core ratio
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and small-model text generation
Suited for in-memory databases, caching, and memory-intensive enterprise applications
